title: Product trial hub
summary: Does a product trial hub (replacing the Account Plan button) increase F2P conversion and trial starts across kSocial, Customer Hub, Customer Agent, CDP, and Marketing Analytics?
hypothesis: We believe that replacing the existing Account Plan button with a new product and trial hub for non-paying accounts will increase the 21D F2P Conversion Rate by educating users on product usage and encouraging trial starts.
notes: Two Statsig experiments: new accounts (50%) and existing accounts (10% to 50%)
control_description: Account Plan button in top nav
treatment_description: Product Trial Hub popover with usage stats and trial options
